---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for search
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Request

**Problem to Solve**
<!-- What problem does this feature address? What is the pain point? -->

**Desired Behavior**
<!-- Describe the behavior you want. Be specific about the UX, API surface, or config change. -->

**Use Case / Target User**
<!-- Who benefits from this feature and how? -->

**Constraints or Non-Goals**
<!-- What should this feature NOT do? Any known limitations or scope boundaries? -->

**Compatibility Expectations**
<!-- Does this need to be backward-compatible? Does it affect existing search API or config? -->

**Additional Context**
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, related issues -->
